title: Collapsing sections in the list
question: Can you fold away a group in the list, or is every phase section always fully expanded?
rationale: Make each section header a toggle to fold its cards/rows, with a caret and the count staying visible, across every view. The collapsed state persists while browsing but resets on reload, so you never return to forgotten hidden content (d18) — chosen over always-expanded (long scroll) or persisting across reloads.

options.label: Click a section header to collapse / expand it (state kept while browsing, resets on reload)

tradeoffs.note: fold finished phases to focus on the ones you care about
collapse the rest to compare decisions within one phase
resets expanded on reload, so nothing stays secretly folded
a per-section toggle, caret, and state kept across re-renders
every phase is always open, so the page gets long to scroll
your folded sections survive a refresh
a section you forgot you collapsed stays hidden on a later visit
